title: Falco Alert Priorities
description:
## Falco Alert Priorities

Falco rules specify a `priority` level to indicate the severity of the threat detected.

Which of the following priority levels is NOT a valid Falco alert priority?

Choose the correct option:
explanation: Falco severity/priority values are based on the standard Unix syslog protocol. The eight valid levels from highest to lowest severity are: Emergency, Alert, Critical, Error, Warning, Notice, Info, and Debug. 'Fatal' is not one of them.

hints.title: Falco Rule Priorities Docs
hints.body: Refer to the priority field guidelines on Falco's rule documentation page.
